compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("wget -q -O- 'https://download.ceph.com/keys/release.asc' | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/ceph.gpg --dearmor");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-add-repository 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/ceph.gpg] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/debian-octopus/ buster main'");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
